# Postora

> Social media management platform to schedule, create, and publish posts across Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, Threads, Pinterest, Twitter/X, Bluesky, and Reddit from one dashboard.

Postora helps creators, marketers, and teams plan content, generate captions and images with AI, schedule across multiple accounts, and review analytics. It also exposes a public REST API and integrations for n8n, Make.com, and an MCP server.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and features.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans for individuals, creators, and teams.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Postora team.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user data is handled.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Usage terms.
- [Cookie Policy](/cookies): Cookie usage details.
- [Google API Disclosure](/google-api-disclosure): Google API limited use disclosure.

## Docs

- [Documentation](/docs): Getting started and guides.
- [API Reference](/docs/api): REST API for posts, media, and accounts.
- [n8n Integration](/docs/n8n-integration): Automate Postora from n8n workflows.
- [Make.com Integration](/docs/make-integration): Connect Postora with Make scenarios.
- [MCP Server](/docs/mcp-server): Drive Postora from AI assistants over MCP.
- [Multi-platform guide](/docs/multi-platform): Posting across platforms.
- [Webhooks](/docs/webhooks): Subscribe to post events.
- [Character limits](/docs/character-limits): Per-platform caption and media limits.
- [Platform media matrix](/docs/media-matrix): Supported media types per platform.
